_comment: Model registry — the single source of truth for model versions and their evaluation history. Future models (v6, v7, ...) are added by appending an entry here and dropping artefacts under evaluation/original/<key>/ (traceable to original artefacts) or evaluation/reproduced/<key>/ (independent reproductions). The app renders this generically; no code change is needed to add a model.

evaluation_types.original_evaluation: Metrics reproduced from the ORIGINAL saved evaluation artefacts (traceable to the original experiment).
evaluation_types.independent_reproduction: A NEW, independent evaluation (fresh train/test split + retrain). NOT the original experiment; provided for reproducibility.

models.name: NT Custom Classifier (v5)
models.description: BirdNET v2.4 embeddings + a custom Northern-Territory head, deployed through the v5.2 multi-species sound-event-detection pipeline. The flagship production model.

documented.label: Documented research values (not yet independently reproduced)
documented.note: Reported in the thesis/README. An exhaustive repository + git-history search found NO original v5 evaluation artefacts (predictions, probabilities, labels, curves), so these values cannot be traced to an evaluation output and are NOT independently verified.

evaluations.title: Independent reproduction — recording-level held-out
evaluations.note: A separate experiment, not the original thesis evaluation: a classifier retrained on a recording-level train split and evaluated on unseen recordings.

models.name: BirdNET v2.4 (global baseline)
models.description: The global pretrained BirdNET model, used as the comparison baseline. Its Northern-Territory performance is reported live on the Comparison tab.

models.name: Custom CNN (v2)
models.description: Mel-spectrogram CNN, segment-level split. Superseded — its 92.7% segment-level accuracy was inflated by data leakage (exposed by v4).

evaluations.title: Original evaluation (traceable)
evaluations.note: Reproduced from the original saved test-set arrays (models/y_test_probs.npy + y_test_true.npy) — the original experiment, recomputed for traceability.

models.name: Custom CNN (v4)
models.description: Same CNN architecture with a recording-level split — the honest (leakage-free) evaluation that exposed v2/v3's inflated accuracy.

evaluations.title: Original evaluation (traceable)
evaluations.note: Reproduced from the original saved recording-level test arrays.
